commands.repair_reason: Draft protected maintainer PR changes security-sensitive authority behavior, so the next step is maintainer/security review and author revision rather than a ClawSweeper repair branch.; Needs attention: The diff removes an existing untrusted-event owner downgrade and needs a replacement authority source before merge.; Review finding: [P1] Restore a replacement authority downgrade before removal — src/infra/heartbeat... commands.review_summary:
The PR removes `SystemEvent.trusted` / `SystemEventOptions.trusted`, normalizes queued system-event prompt formatting to `System:`, and drops queued-event trust from reply and heartbeat sender-owner authority.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: compare the PR’s `ForceSenderIsOwnerFalse: hasExecCompletion` change with current command auth’s use of that flag, then run the affected heartbeat and system-event tests. I did not run tests because this review is required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: Draft protected maintainer PR changes security-sensitive authority behavior, so the next step is maintainer/security review and author revision rather than a ClawSweeper repair branch.

target.title: [codex] remove queued system event trust plumbing
